title: royena hirsuta var. microphylla
intro: Royena hirsuta var. microphylla, also known as the hairy kingia or kingia, is a plant species of the family Cunoniaceae, native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Royena hirsuta var. microphylla include its potential to alleviate skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems, as well as its capacity to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
